sources.reason: No fixed official symbol/pair order that predicts row0 labels without target-fit transforms.
Numeric/vector seeds remain mechanism watchlist material; no controlled row0-label predictor.
Official unglossed numeric motif; useful as watchlist only, not a pair-label source.
Numeric identity motifs survive as weak mechanism clues, not a row0 formula.
External 10-channel order can support arity tests, but no authority for Tibia row0 labels.
Lore text presence does not become a fixed low-cost label order under controls.
